overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt walking through a dark forest at night, crossing a torch-lit stone bridge, and continuing along an open country path toward distant snow-capped mountains. The atmosphere is moody and atmospheric with blue-toned night lighting.

events.description: goats become visible grazing on the left side of the path
approaching stone bridge entrance with lit torches

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the forest dirt path toward the stone bridge entrance

notable_agents.action: goats grazing on the grass beside the path

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail winding through dense forest
tall pine trees lining both sides of the trail
brown goats grazing on vegetation beside the path
stone archway entrance with burning torches marking the bridge approach

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt trail through a dense pine forest at night. Several goats graze peacefully on the left side of the path. Ahead, a stone bridge entrance with burning torches becomes visible, marking the transition to a fortified crossing.

scene_state.functional_zone: fortified stone bridge with torch lighting

events.description: entering the covered stone bridge structure
transition from cobblestone to wooden plank bridge deck

agents.ego_description: crossing the torch-lit stone bridge with high walls on both sides

entered.detail: high stone walls with weathered texture forming the bridge sides
burning torches mounted on the stone walls providing warm orange light
wooden plank section in the middle of the bridge crossing

segments.scene_description: The character enters a fortified stone bridge with high walls and burning torches that cast flickering orange light against the cool night. The ground transitions from dirt to cobblestone and then to wooden planks as the character crosses the span. The dense forest and goats are left behind as the bridge creates a sheltered corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: open countryside path with mountain vista

events.description: exiting the bridge into open countryside landscape
distant snow-capped mountains become visible on the horizon

agents.ego_description: walking along the open trail toward the distant mountain range

entered.detail: expansive grassy meadows stretching to the horizon
large snow-capped mountain range visible in the distance under the night sky
low stone wall running alongside the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: Exiting the bridge, the scene opens into a wide countryside landscape with expansive grasslands. A low stone wall runs along the right side of the dirt trail. In the distance, majestic snow-capped mountains become visible against the dark night sky as the character continues walking toward the horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the claustrophobic depths of a nocturnal pine forest into a vast, open mountain landscape. It begins on a narrow dirt trail where goats graze amidst dense trees, moving steadily toward the flickering orange glow of a fortified stone bridge. As the character enters the crossing, the environment shifts from soft earth to cobblestone and wooden planks, with high walls and burning torches creating a sheltered corridor that cuts off the surrounding woods. The scene then opens abruptly upon exiting the bridge, expanding into wide grasslands where a low stone wall lines the path. Finally, the camera tracks forward across the expansive countryside, revealing majestic snow-capped mountains looming against the dark night sky on the distant horizon.
